name: base-4096-contracts
description: Pay-to-play and discount NFT contracts for 4096base (Base Sepolia testnet).
comment:hardhat-pin: Hardhat is pinned to EXACTLY 2.26.1 — the last 2.x release that bundles the STABLE @nomicfoundation/edr 0.11.3. Hardhat 2.27.0+ switched to a prerelease EDR (0.12.0-next.x) whose forked generic-chain provider ignores the per-chain hardforkHistory override, which broke the Base-mainnet fork test ('not configured with a hardfork activation history'). Do not bump to ^2.27/^2.28 without re-verifying npm run test:fork. Hardhat 3 would fix forking natively but requires an incompatible toolbox/ESM/test-runner migration.
comment:hardhat-ethers-pin: @nomicfoundation/hardhat-toolbox@5 pulls hardhat-ethers@3.1.3, which bumped its peer requirement to hardhat ^2.28.0 and conflicts with the 2.26.1 pin. The override below holds it at 3.1.2 — the last release that accepts hardhat ^2.26.0.
